question: How many customers have ordered the product named Monitor?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM Customer_Orders JOIN Order_Items ON Customer_Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id JOIN Products ON Order_Items.product_id = Products.product_id WHERE Products.product_name = 'Monitor';

back_translation.intent: 统计满足条件的客户数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问订购了名为Monitor的产品的客户数量，SQL反向翻译描述正确地使用了COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)并过滤了Products.product_name = 'Monitor'，符合原始问题的意图。
